title: Skytrace 21a
description: Backports the updated cloud texture pattern from snapshot 25w21a to versions 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, and 1.21.5.
body:
Skytrace 21a brings the subtle yet distinct cloud pattern changes from snapshot 25w21a to older Minecraft versions—1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, and 1.21.5. This pack refreshes the sky with updated cloud formations that maintain the vanilla feel while adding a touch of modern elegance to the horizon. Perfect for players who want to keep their skies in sync with the latest visual tweaks without moving to experimental snapshots.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
